CustomField.formula:
CASE ( Profile.Name , " PT1", "System Administrator" , " PT2", "Standard User" , " PT3", "Read Only" , Profile.Name )
/* PT1 System Administrator PT2 Standard User PT3 Read Only PT4 Solution Manager PT5 Marketing User PT6 Contract Manager PT7 Partner User PT8 Standard Platform User PT9 Standard Platform One User PT10 Salesforce Administrator PT11 Package License Manager PT12 Standard Partner PT13 Customer Portal User PT14 Customer Portal Manager */
CustomField.label: fxProfileName
